title: This New Claude Code Feature is a Game Changer

extracted.hook: Cloud Code can now remind you to do things, check on things proactively for you, and work for days straight without you ever touching it or needing to give any input.
transitions: So, in today's video, I'm going to break all of that down and tell you everything that you need to know about it.
All right. All right. So, there's a couple things that I wanted you guys to understand about how this actually works.

extracted.analogies: "it's using the loop skill, as you can see, which is a new built-in skill"
extracted.curiosity_gaps: "And this doesn't have to be every 10 minutes. It could be every hour. It could be every 5 minutes. It could be whatever interval that you want."
